Therefore Jupiter+ Dragon Tail
Native is having philosphical inclination and also status in
governmental affairs. (Dragon Tail) stands for "Dhwaja Keerti:

For the father SUN+JUPITER+DRAGON TAIL
For the native JUPITER+DRAGON TAIL+SUN.
How to interpret when more than one Planet is posited in
the same sign?
In few cases 2-3 planets are posited in a particular sign. In
such case we have to consider the degrees of planets and then
further assessments are to be made.
